THE NEXT 20 YEARS START NOW
Conversational solutions for every use case
Verticalized & AI use cases
Design customer journeys
Build any use case on messaging or voice channels for your industry e.g. finance, healthcare, retail, using AI and our conversational experience platform.
Explore
Composable CX modules
Create conversations that click
Enable dynamic two-way interactions for marketing and customer support through messaging or programmable voice.
Explore
Programmable Channels
Connect on any channel
Effortlessly deliver messages across all channels from a unified messaging platform using the most advanced channel APIs in the world.
Explore
Network and APIs
Secure and scale every interaction
Protect your customers and their data with authentication tools or simply build communication workflows on our secure, flexible CPaaS APIs, and the most powerful network in the world.

Authenticate users, boost security and build trust
Secure transactions and account logins with a user-friendly authentication experience. Ensure global and local compliance and protection against unauthorized access.
Contact us
Start strong to build loyalty with seamless onboarding
Streamline customer onboarding with efficient, secure processes that enhance user experience. Simplify account setup, ensure compliance, and establish lasting loyalty from the first interaction.
Contact us
Update customers on exciting new features and services
Increase customer lifetime value by making them the first to know about the latest innovations, features and financial products.
Contact us
Activate banking services with ease
Make activating services, applying for loans or creating accounts available at a click of a button over a secure messaging channel.
Contact us
Highlight exclusive offers to maximize customer value
Effectively promote new offers with targeted messages. Drive engagement, enhance customer satisfaction, and encourage adoption of products and services tailored to their financial needs.
Contact us
Reconnect and re-engage with inactive customers
Reignite customer interest with personalized messages that highlight tailored solutions and offers. Encourage inactive users to rediscover the value of your services and strengthen their relationship with your brand.
Contact us

Personalized offers
Back-in-stock alerts
Delivery notifications
Manage orders
Share loyalty points
Launch your latest products with impact
Reach your target audience instantly with product announcements and promotions. Drive excitement and boost sales with targeted omnichannel marketing campaigns.
Contact us
Delight customers with tailored offers
Send tailored promotions based on customer preferences and behavior. Increase customer engagement and loyalty with timely and relevant offers.
Contact us
Reclaim lost sales with smart cart recovery
Win back customers who abandon their carts with automated reminders and incentives. Recover lost revenue and improve conversion rates.
Contact us
Keep your customers informed and engaged
Notify customers as soon as their desired products are back in stock. Drive immediate sales and strengthen customer relationships.
Contact us
Empower your customers with self-service options
Enable customers to track, modify, and return orders easily through SMS, Email, Voice or chat apps. Improve customer satisfaction and reduce support costs.
Contact us
Reward your loyal customers
Send personalized loyalty point notifications and redemption reminders. Encourage repeat purchases and foster long-term customer relationships.
Contact us
Answer FAQs 24/7
Upsell and cross-sell with personalized offers
Make top-ups easy
Convert prepaid customers to postpaid
Improve dunning process
Promote app adoption
Provide instant support, anytime, anywhere
Automate customer support with simple and AI-powered chatbots. Resolve common queries instantly and reduce customer wait times.
Contact us
Boost revenue with targeted offers
Send personalized offers based on customer usage patterns and preferences. Increase average revenue per user (ARPU) and customer lifetime value (CLV).
Contact us
Simplify top-ups and boost customer satisfaction
Enable customers to top up their accounts easily. Improve customer experience and reduce churn.
Contact us
Drive postpaid conversions
Send personalized offers and incentives to convert prepaid customers to postpaid plans. Increase revenue and customer loyalty.
Contact us
Proactive reminders so customers don’t miss out
Send timely reminders for bill payments, plan expiration, and other important notifications. Reduce missed payments and improve customer satisfaction.
Contact us
Enhance customer engagement through mobile apps
Promote app adoption to provide customers with convenient access to account management, billing, and service features. Simplify customer interactions and reduce dependency on physical stores or call centers.
Contact us

Streamline the scheduling process, reduce wait times, and enhance patient satisfaction with convenient and efficient access to healthcare services.

Deliver critical test results instantly and securely
Send time-sensitive test results directly to patients’ mobile devices. Ensure timely patient care and reduce administrative burdens.

We calculate the estimate based on the average price of a channel in the selected country. The exact price you’ll pay per message may vary based on the destination country, network and applicable discounts. When sending large campaigns, multiple networks may be used, depending on speed and availability.

SMS pricing
SMS offers a flexible pay-as-you-go pricing model, allowing you to only pay for what you use.
Achieve the highest SMS delivery rates worldwide using a reliable business texting service from Infobip.
Our business SMS service supports a variety of use cases, ensuring the highest delivery rates. It also includes industry-leading fraud protection systems, personalization features, and more.

hits.title: European communications startup Infobip raises $200M for over $1B valuation
Infobip's MCP Servers Enable Smarter AI Communication
You're not a senior engineer until you've worked on a legacy project (2023)
Communication Logs: Handling 250M SMS messages a day
The siren song of ChatGPT and junior devs that listen to it
The must-have content to include in your API documentation
Improving Docker deployment process across remote data centers

analysis.name: Infobip
analysis.value_proposition: A full-stack CPaaS and customer engagement platform connecting enterprises to customers across 20+ channels with agentic AI, journey orchestration, and global telecom-grade infrastructure.
analysis.ideal_customer: Large enterprises, telecoms, and digital-native platforms needing global omnichannel messaging at scale with programmable APIs and no-code engagement tools

features.name: sms api
features.description: Programmatic SMS sending and receiving via REST API

features.name: rcs api
features.description: Rich Communication Services messaging API for interactive mobile messages

features.name: email api
features.description: Transactional and marketing email delivery via API

features.name: mms api
features.description: Multimedia messaging service API for sending rich media messages

features.name: voice api
features.description: Programmable voice calls and IVR via API

features.name: live chat api
features.description: Real-time web and mobile live chat messaging API

features.name: video api
features.description: Programmable video calling and conferencing API

features.name: in-app messaging
features.description: SDK-based in-app messaging for mobile and web applications

features.name: mobile push api
features.description: Push notification delivery for iOS and Android via API

features.name: whatsapp api
features.description: WhatsApp Business API for customer messaging at scale

features.name: viber for business api
features.description: Viber Business Messages API for brand-to-customer communication

features.name: messenger api
features.description: Facebook Messenger API integration for customer conversations

features.name: instagram api
features.description: Instagram Direct Messaging API for customer engagement

features.name: telegram api
features.description: Telegram channel and bot messaging integration

features.name: apple messages for business
features.description: Apple Messages for Business channel integration

features.name: kakaotalk messaging
features.description: KakaoTalk Business messaging channel for Korea market

features.name: line messaging
features.description: LINE channel integration for Asian markets

features.name: zalo messaging
features.description: Zalo channel integration for Vietnam market

features.name: agentos
features.description: Agentic AI platform for building and orchestrating autonomous AI communication agents

features.name: ai agents
features.description: Pre-built and custom AI agents for automated customer interactions
features.evidence_quote: AI agents — AI hub — Infobip MCP servers — Voice AI agents

features.name: ai chatbot builder
features.description: No-code/low-code builder for creating conversational AI chatbots

features.name: voice ai agents
features.description: AI-powered voice agents for automated inbound and outbound calls

features.name: infobip mcp servers
features.description: Model Context Protocol servers enabling AI clients to interact with Infobip messaging APIs
features.evidence_quote: Infobip MCP servers — Send SMS using an Infobip MCP server and an AI client

features.name: journey orchestration
features.description: Visual customer journey builder for multi-step omnichannel campaigns

features.name: moments
features.description: Marketing automation and customer journey orchestration product (branded as Moments)

features.name: automation studio
features.description: Visual automation workflow builder for customer engagement flows

features.name: cloud contact center
features.description: Omnichannel cloud contact center with agent workspace and routing

features.name: conversations
features.description: Agent inbox and conversation management for omnichannel customer support

features.name: inbox
features.description: Unified agent inbox for managing customer conversations across channels

features.name: customer data platform
features.description: CDP for unifying customer profiles and data from multiple sources

features.name: people (customer profiles)
features.description: Customer profile management and segmentation tool

features.name: conversational ai
features.description: NLU-powered conversational AI engine for intent recognition and dialogue management

features.name: answers (chatbot product)
features.description: No-code chatbot builder and conversation design tool (branded as Answers)

features.name: insights and analytics
features.description: Cross-channel analytics, reporting dashboards, and messaging performance metrics

features.name: metrics api
features.description: Programmatic access to messaging delivery and performance metrics

features.name: smart messaging
features.description: Intelligent channel routing to optimize cost and deliverability across channels
features.evidence_quote: Smart Messaging — Optimize your messaging costs with the most efficient channel mix

features.name: infobip signals
features.description: Fraud detection and blocking for OTP/authentication traffic
features.evidence_quote: Infobip Signals — Block fraudulent OTP traffic

features.name: cpaas x api
features.description: Modular API stack for platforms needing to embed communications at scale
features.evidence_quote: CPaaS X API — Modular API stack to help platforms scale exponentially

features.name: authentication api
features.description: Customer authentication and verification via multiple channels
features.evidence_quote: Authentication API — Customer authentication and verification

features.name: 2fa service
features.description: Two-factor authentication service via SMS, voice, or other channels

features.name: mobile identity api
features.description: Network-based mobile identity verification to protect and identify users
features.evidence_quote: Mobile identity API — Protect and identify your users

features.name: number lookup api
features.description: HLR/number validation API to identify invalid or ported numbers before sending
features.evidence_quote: Number lookup API — Root out invalid numbers

features.name: numbers management
features.description: Virtual number provisioning and management including long codes, short codes, toll-free

features.name: 10dlc registration
features.description: US 10-Digit Long Code registration and compliance management

features.name: anam protect firewall
features.description: Telecom-grade firewall protecting operators from SMS and Voice fraud
features.evidence_quote: Anam Protect Firewall — Secure your network from SMS and Voice fraud — protects 120+ operators

features.name: sms firewall
features.description: A2P SMS firewall ensuring proper charging and eliminating revenue leakage for operators
features.evidence_quote: SMS Firewall — Ensure all A2P SMS traffic is properly charged and eliminate revenue leakage

features.name: networks apis (camara)
features.description: Telecom network APIs exposing core network capabilities via CAMARA-standard interfaces
features.evidence_quote: Networks APIs — Tap into the core of telecom networks

features.name: rcs connectivity and maap
features.description: RCS MaaP (Messaging as a Platform) for operator-level RCS billing and control
features.evidence_quote: RCS Connectivity and Infobip MaaP — Gain full control, visibility, and billing efficiency

features.name: omnichannel messages api
features.description: Unified API for sending messages across all supported channels from a single endpoint

features.name: broadcast
features.description: Bulk message broadcasting to large recipient lists across channels

features.name: blocklist
features.description: Managed opt-out/blocklist for suppressing messages to specific numbers

features.name: subscriptions management
features.description: API subscription and resource management for channel and country-level control
features.evidence_quote: Subscriptions management — Resource management on country and channel level

features.name: cx consulting
features.description: Professional CX advisory services to maximize return on CX investments
features.evidence_quote: CX consulting — Maximize return on your CX investments

features.name: professional services
features.description: Implementation and onboarding services for early and sustainable ROI
features.evidence_quote: Professional services — Ensure early and sustainable ROI on your CX investments

features.name: cx maturity assessment
features.description: Structured assessment to evaluate and improve conversational CX maturity
features.evidence_quote: CX maturity assessment — Find out how to reach your full conversational potential

features.name: sdks
features.description: Official SDKs for multiple programming languages to simplify API integration

features.name: openapi specification
features.description: Machine-readable OpenAPI spec for all Infobip APIs

features.name: ai hub
features.description: Centralized hub for AI tools, models, and AI agent configuration

features.name: developer community
features.description: Discord-based developer community for support and collaboration

features.name: compliance guidelines
features.description: Built-in compliance documentation and tooling for USA, Canada, and Asia messaging regulations
features.evidence_quote: Compliance guidelines — USA & Canada messaging regulations — Asia messaging registration

features.name: embeddable customer engagement
features.description: White-label or embeddable engagement modules for third-party platforms

features.name: high-volume sms infrastructure
features.description: Infrastructure capable of processing 250M+ SMS messages per day
features.evidence_quote: Communication Logs: Handling 250M SMS messages a day

differentiators: AgentOS — purpose-built agentic AI platform for autonomous communication agents
Infobip MCP servers enabling AI clients to natively send messages via Model Context Protocol
Anam Protect Firewall protecting 120+ telecom operators from SMS and Voice fraud
Network APIs via CAMARA standard giving access to telecom core network capabilities
20+ natively supported messaging channels on a single platform
Infrastructure handling 250M+ SMS messages per day
CPaaS X modular API stack for platforms building embedded communications at scale
Infobip Signals for OTP fraud detection and blocking
Global presence with direct operator connections across regions
Full-stack from CPaaS APIs to no-code engagement tools on one platform
